HyprSpaceOS
Features Downloads Gallery Docs Download
Everything Included

Features

Every component carefully selected and configured. Nothing wasted, nothing missing. From the kernel to the cursor, every pixel has a purpose.

Desktop Environment

Hyprland Compositor

Dynamic tiling Wayland compositor with smooth animations, blur, rounded corners, and unparalleled customization.

Waybar

Highly customizable status bar with workspaces, system tray, clock, and resource monitors.

Rofi Launcher

Fast application launcher with fuzzy search, custom themes, and clipboard manager integration.

Dunst Notifications

Lightweight notification daemon with custom styling, history, and do-not-disturb mode.

Clean Desktop

Screenshot placeholder

Performance & Base

Arch Linux Foundation

Rolling release, bleeding-edge packages, and access to the AUR for virtually any software.

Optimized Kernel

Pre-tuned Linux kernel with scheduler improvements and low-latency patches for desktop responsiveness.

ZRAM & Swap

Pre-configured ZRAM for compressed memory swapping, significantly reducing disk I/O.

Fast Boot

Optimized boot sequence using systemd-boot with minimal initramfs. Boot to desktop in under 5 seconds on SSD.

Tiling Layout

Screenshot placeholder

Visual & Experience

Glassmorphism Theme

System-wide transparent blur effects, frosted glass panels, and a cohesive dark color scheme.

Animated Wallpapers

Live gradient wallpapers with smooth transitions, or use your own static images with blur overlays.

Custom Cursor & Icons

Coherent icon theme and animated cursor set matching the HyprSpaceOS visual identity.

Smooth Animations

60fps+ animations for window management, workspace switching, and UI transitions via Hyprland config.

Blur & Glass

Screenshot placeholder

Technical Specs

What's under the hood. Every version-numbered detail.

Kernel Linux 6.14 LTS (latest stable)
Compositor Hyprland 0.48.x
Display Server Wayland (no X11 fallback)
Init System systemd
Bootloader systemd-boot
Filesystem Btrfs with compression + snapshots
Package Manager pacman + yay (AUR helper)
Default Shell Zsh with powerlevel10k
Terminal Emulator Kitty
Status Bar Waybar (custom config)
App Launcher Rofi (fuzzy search)
Notification Daemon Dunst
Wallpaper Utility swww (animated transitions)
Clipboard wl-clipboard + cliphist
Screenshot grim + slurp + swappy

How We Stack Up

Honest comparison against other Arch-based distributions.

Aspect HyprSpaceOS Arch Linux EndeavourOS Garuda Linux
Base Arch Linux Arch Linux Arch Linux
Default Desktop Hyprland None (DIY) KDE Plasma (custom)
Compositor Hyprland (pre-tuned) Choose your own KWin
AUR Access Yes (yay pre-installed) Manual setup Yes (Chaotic-AUR)
Installer Calamares (custom) archinstall CLI Calamares
Btrfs Snapshots Pre-configured Manual setup Yes
Theming Glassmorphism dark None (stock) Heavy theme
Boot Time (SSD) <5s Varies (~5-8s) ~8-12s
ISO Size 3.2 GB (Full) ~800 MB ~3.5 GB

Comparisons based on latest stable releases as of June 2026. Your mileage may vary.

Convinced yet?

Download HyprSpaceOS and experience the difference. Free, open source, and built for you.
